summary: A brief post recommending a sale on clamps from Penn State Industries, noting they are significantly cheaper than comparable Jorgensen clamps on Amazon. Shapiro vouches for PSI based on past positive ordering experiences. The post is written in a playful tone under the byline of 'Nothing Severed Yet,' a woodworking publication.
key_points: Penn State Industries clamps are less than half the price of Jorgensen clamps on Amazon
Shapiro has had consistently positive experiences ordering from PSI
The post reflects Shapiro's hands-on maker and woodworking hobby
money_quotes: Jorgergengerhansonson (or however you spell it) clamps on Amazon are more than twice as much.
key_insight: A lighthearted woodworking tip reflecting Shapiro's maker roots long before his tech career took center stage.
